stemHtml: On a particular day part of a polar front jet stream runs from north to south in the northern hemisphere. This means that..

options.a: above the core of the jet the horizontal temperature gradient runs from north to south.
options.b: below the core of the jet the horizontal temperature gradient runs from north to south.
options.c: the polar air is below and to the east of the core of the jet.
options.d: the polar air is on the eastern side and above the core of the jet.
